texto: Did I really read every single book in the school? My mother maintains I did. Maybe I just told the teachers I had and they all believed me. Maybe this is where the lying about books really began. Where were the checks and balances? I blame the authorities.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Andy Miller que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “Did I really read every single book in the school? My mother maintains I did. Maybe I just told t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, books, lying, com foco em lying e reading.
